candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, but not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line and best match for cash and cash equivalents among provided balance-sheet labels.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, useful cross-check but target requests balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the period-end balance-sheet amount.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash label as requested; cash flow ending cash corroborates the amount.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Current liability component, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current borrowings and current portion of non-current borrowings
candidates.why: Clean total for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt; excludes leases and avoids double counting with component maturities.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Component of current debt, but redundant if the broader current borrowings total is used.

final_choice.row_label: Current borrowings and current portion of non-current borrowings

variables.notes: Chose the clean total current debt line and excluded lease liabilities per instructions.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact semantic match for net PPE and preferable to components or balancing lines, even though preview values are blank.
Balancing version of the total PPE line; less preferred than the clean reported label.

candidates.row_label: Other Tangible Fixed Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Tangible asset-related but not clearly total PPE.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clean exact PPE total/net line and is clearly preferable under the data rules.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
